'''Dura-Kahn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. It was part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and inhabited by [[Human/Legends|Humans]] who maintained a tradition of big game hunting. One young native hunter was [[Moradmin Bast/Legends|Moradmin Bast]], who became an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]].<ref name="Empire's Finest">{{InsiderCite|96|The Empire's Finest: Who's Who in the Imperial Military}}</ref>

The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jodo Kast]], a long-time partner of [[Puggles Trodd/Legends|Puggles Trodd]] and [[Zardra]], decided to end their partnership with both of them on this planet. Kast had come to this decision because too many missions that had involved Trodd and Zardra had failed, almost taking Kast's life in the process. Since that moment, Kast began working alone, at least until his fatal run-in with [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], whom the bounty hunter had been attempting to impersonate on occasion.<ref name="History of the Mandalorians">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref>
